entities.name: orforglipron
entities.context: orforglipron (LY3502970, originally OWL-833), is being developed by Eli Lilly with the molecular formula C48H48F2N10O5 and molecular weight 882.96

entities.context: proteolytic degradation by enzymes such as dipeptidyl peptidase-4 (DPP-4)

entities.name: neutral endopeptidase
entities.context: proteolytic degradation by enzymes such as dipeptidyl peptidase-4 (DPP-4) and neutral endopeptidases

entities.name: type 2 diabetes
entities.context: Danuglipron, derived from this chemical series, reached Phase 2/3 clinical trials for type 2 diabetes and obesity

entities.name: obesity

entities.name: GLP-1 receptor allosteric activation
entities.context: activate the GLP-1 receptor through an allosteric mechanism. The compounds bind within a transmembrane pocket distinct from the orthosteric peptide-binding domain

attributes.title: GLP-1 receptor agonists and uses thereof (small molecule)

entities.name: ACHIEVE program
entities.context: demonstrated significant weight loss and HbA1c reduction in Phase 3 trials (ACHIEVE program)
